Package core.transaction

Class AccountingTransaction

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountingTransaction
All Implemented Interfaces:
AccountingTransactionIntf
public class AccountingTransaction extends Object implements AccountingTransactionIntf
Represents a group of related account entries.
